posts.author: perma-maga
posts.title: Ohio father and his 11-year-old son killed after an illegal alien driver of semi-truck rammed multiple vehicles

twitter.content:
A Lima, Ohio, father and his 11-year-old son are dead after a semi slammed into multiple vehicles. 

Yvio Transportation, a one-truck operation based in Florida, had a 100% vehicle out-of-service rate at the time of the crash. Six months ago, he was placed OOS for faulty brakes.
